name: COI_primer_MiFish_U_F
description: COI / animal-eDNA primer-binding consensus 'MiFish_U_F' (length 21 bp). Consensus: GTCGGTAAAACTCGTGCCAGC. Fish 12S MiFish forward; Miya 2015 (12S not COI but same eDNA workflow). Conserved across the intended taxonomic range; mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch.
